tasks.label: verify local mode run
args: pnpm build && pnpm audit --json > /tmp/autoremediator-audit.json || true && node dist/cli.js /tmp/autoremediator-audit.json --cwd . --llm-provider local --dry-run --run-tests

tasks.label: local mode demo command check
verify local cve dry run
args: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js CVE-2021-23337 --cwd ./demo-vuln-app --llm-provider local --dry-run --run-tests

tasks.label: retest local cve dry run
args: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js CVE-2021-23337 --cwd ./demo-vuln-app --llm-provider local --dry-run --run-tests

tasks.label: debug local stack 2
find no-fix cve candidates
args: node -e "const ids=['CVE-2017-16042','CVE-2017-16011','CVE-2017-16026','CVE-2020-26289','CVE-2020-36632','CVE-2021-23337','CVE-2021-32803','CVE-2018-16469']; (async()=>{for(const id of ids){try{const r=await fetch('https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/'+id); if(!r.ok){console.log(id,'HTTP',r.status); continue;} const j=await r.json(); const npm=(j.affected||[]).filter(a=>a.package&&a.package.ecosystem==='npm'); let hasFixed=false; for(const a of npm){for(const rg of (a.ranges||[])){for(const ev of (rg.events||[])){if(ev.fixed) hasFixed=true;}}} console.log(id,'npmPkgs=',npm.length,'hasFixed=',hasFixed);}catch(e){console.log(id,'ERR',e.message)}}})()"

tasks.label: find no-fix cve candidates 2
build and run no-fix patch fallback demo
generate demo patch file for sjcl
args: pnpm --dir demo-vuln-app add -D patch-package && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='demo-vuln-app/node_modules/sjcl/package.json'; const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); j.autoremediatorDemoPatched=true; fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\\n');" && (cd demo-vuln-app && pnpm exec patch-package sjcl)

tasks.label: mark sjcl and create patch-package patch
args: node tmp-mark-sjcl.mjs && (cd demo-vuln-app && pnpm exec patch-package sjcl)

tasks.label: create patch from sjcl.js change
args: node tmp-mark-sjcl-js.mjs && (cd demo-vuln-app && pnpm exec patch-package sjcl)
